name: Chickpea Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the onions.
2. Cut the ginger into small pieces.
3. Put the chopped onions, ginger, garlic cloves, mustard powder, and cumin in a blender. Blend until smooth.
4. Cut the tomato into small pieces.
5. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the blended mixture (from step 3) to the pan and sauté until fragrant.
6. When the spices are thickened, add the chopped tomato. Stir and cook for 5 minutes.
7. Add the cooked chickpeas, water, salt, cinnamon powder, and turmeric powder. Mix well.
8. Cook for an additional 8 to 10 minutes over low heat until tender.
9. Serve hot or warm.
